## name: SQL Problem
about: Add a new SQL problem write-up and solution
title: "Day XX SQL: "
labels: sql

## Summary



---

## What's included

### Documentation

- Problem statement and constraints
- Table schemas and sample data
- Table relationship explained (PK / FK)
- Join type rationale (why LEFT vs INNER, etc.)
- Dry run with step-by-step trace
- Query breakdown (SELECT, FROM, JOIN, ON, etc.)
- Visual diagrams (Mermaid / tables)
- LEFT JOIN vs INNER JOIN comparison (if applicable)
- ON vs WHERE distinction (if applicable)
- Complexity analysis
- Pattern recognition
- Common mistakes
- Interview questions
- Related problems

### Solution

- SQL implementation added
- Accepted on LeetCode

### Repository updates

- Root `README.md` updated
- SQL roadmap updated
- Progress tracker updated
- Navigation link added (if applicable)

---

## Concepts covered



- SELECT / WHERE / ORDER BY
- JOIN (INNER / LEFT / RIGHT)
- GROUP BY / HAVING
- Subquery
- CTE
- Window function
- NULL handling

## Checklist

- Links in root README resolve correctly
- Branch targets `main`
